nextLevelGap: No evidence yet shows an orbital-class architecture repeatedly recovering and reflying every mission-critical stage and spacecraft.
statusRationale: The approved corpus contains current reflight evidence and no capability-wide program end.

nextLevelGap: Routine, repeatable settlement-scale depot transfer across multiple missions has not been directly demonstrated.
statusRationale: OSAM-1 ended, but that project cancellation is explicitly non-node-wide and does not erase other demonstrated transfer capability.

nextLevelGap: No flight evidence joins settlement-scale thrust or power, thermal control, and required lifetime beyond the near-Earth system.
statusRationale: The NERVA operating lineage ended in 1973 and no later qualifying state claim restored it within the 15-year dormancy window.

nextLevelGap: No controlled atmospheric landing has delivered at least 10 tonnes of usable cargo to a non-Earth destination.
statusRationale: Recent flight demonstrations remain active evidence and no capability-wide program end is recorded.

nextLevelGap: No current program repeatedly operates crew or settlement-cargo ascent from a non-Earth surface into a sustained logistics chain.
statusRationale: Apollo 17 closed the demonstrated lunar surface-ascent operating lineage and no later qualifying state claim restored it.

nextLevelGap: The corpus does not show repeated end-to-end emergency coverage across a complete settlement transport route and all credible failure phases.
statusRationale: Operational abort and crew recovery evidence remains active with no capability-wide end.

nextLevelGap: No evidence establishes a settlement-scale, multi-organization logistics standard with sustained accountable handoff beyond low Earth orbit.
statusRationale: Operational resupply evidence remains current and no capability-wide program end is recorded.

nextLevelGap: No single accountable campaign has exercised reuse, orbital logistics, refueling, deep-space propulsion, landing, ascent, and crew safety as one governed route.
statusRationale: A partial integrated transport precedent is retained and no capability-wide end is recorded.

nextLevelGap: The evidence does not yet demonstrate a destination-independent closed atmosphere-and-water loop sustained under settlement crew load.
statusRationale: ISS closure evidence is active and no capability-wide program end is recorded.

nextLevelGap: No sustained system supplies a nutritionally material share of crew demand with repeatable safe processing and yield.
statusRationale: Repeated edible-crop demonstrations remain active evidence without a capability-wide end.

nextLevelGap: No crewed deep-space or surface deployment has yet shown sustained dose control through operational forecasting, sheltering, and shielding.
statusRationale: Recent flight validation remains active and no capability-wide program end is recorded.

nextLevelGap: Long-duration partial-gravity clinical outcomes and countermeasures have not been demonstrated in a settlement-relevant population.
statusRationale: Operational microgravity countermeasure evidence remains active and no capability-wide end is recorded.

nextLevelGap: No crewed habitat has safely and repeatedly converted solid and organic waste into qualified reusable resources at operational scale.
statusRationale: Flight demonstration evidence remains active and no capability-wide program end is recorded.

nextLevelGap: Autonomous interpretation, diagnosis, treatment selection, and treatment delivery without real-time Earth support remain unproven.
statusRationale: AMOS supports partial in-flight procedure autonomy and no capability-wide program end is recorded.

nextLevelGap: No continuously crewed settlement has operated all P2 elements for 26 months while receiving no Earth-origin material.
statusRationale: Continuous habitation provides partial integration evidence and no capability-wide program end is recorded.

nextLevelGap: No destination operation has built and qualified a habitat-scale structure from local material under relevant environmental loads.
statusRationale: Integrated terrestrial analog construction evidence remains active without a capability-wide end.

nextLevelGap: A destination surface grid has not sustained generation, storage, distribution, and credible fault recovery for habitat loads.
statusRationale: In-space array integration is active partial evidence and no capability-wide program end is recorded.

nextLevelGap: No persistent destination network has demonstrated interoperable relay, surface coverage, timing, and degraded-mode operation at settlement scale.
statusRationale: Lunar navigation-beacon flight evidence is active and no capability-wide program end is recorded.

nextLevelGap: A surface habitat has not operated habitat-scale heat transport and rejection across destination cycles and credible faults.
statusRationale: The integrated crew-chamber prototype supports partial credit and no capability-wide program end is recorded.

nextLevelGap: No sustained destination system integrates dust prevention, removal, containment, and monitoring across suits, airlocks, habitats, and mechanisms.
statusRationale: Recent lunar dust measurement evidence is active and no capability-wide program end is recorded.

nextLevelGap: The integrated habitat has not operated at a non-Earth destination through actual environmental cycles, logistics constraints, and faults.
statusRationale: The long-duration analog supports integration credit and no capability-wide program end is recorded.

nextLevelGap: No destination system has sustained settlement-scale production and operational use of local propellant, water, or oxygen.
statusRationale: Resource Prospector ended, but that project cancellation is non-node-wide; MOXIE flight evidence remains active.

nextLevelGap: No settlement-scale fission power system has operated in flight or on a destination surface with its full heat-rejection and load chain.
statusRationale: Full-power ground testing remains active evidence and no capability-wide program end is recorded.

nextLevelGap: A destination-scale structural component made from the candidate material has not been qualified under combined service loads and aging.
statusRationale: Space-exposure material evidence remains active and no capability-wide program end is recorded.

nextLevelGap: No destination operation has qualified useful tools, spares, or structures made from local or recycled feedstock.
statusRationale: OSAM-2 ended, but that project cancellation is non-node-wide; in-space manufacturing evidence remains active.

nextLevelGap: The reviewed official corpus contains no direct evidence of one system jointly extracting, processing, storing, distributing, and using destination resources.
statusRationale: L0 records absence of direct integration evidence, not absence of component research; no capability-wide program end is recorded.

nextLevelGap: No destination deployment has autonomously built and verified settlement-scale infrastructure from site preparation through acceptance.
statusRationale: OSAM-2 ended, but that project cancellation is non-node-wide; autonomous assembly prototypes remain active evidence.

nextLevelGap: No system has sustained full settlement operations across planning, navigation, resource constraints, faults, and handoffs with bounded Earth support.
statusRationale: Operational planetary autonomy evidence remains active and no capability-wide program end is recorded.

nextLevelGap: No autonomous destination system has diagnosed and physically restored representative settlement hardware through repeated real faults.
statusRationale: Orbital servicing evidence remains active and no capability-wide program end is recorded.

nextLevelGap: No destination campaign has sustained integrated autonomous construction, operations, logistics, and maintenance through representative faults.
statusRationale: Integrated fault-and-logistics demonstrations support partial credit and no capability-wide program end is recorded.

nextLevelGap: A durable settlement logistics market with repeatable service, price, cadence, and multiple-cycle demand has not been demonstrated.
statusRationale: Licensed commercial operating cadence remains active and no capability-wide market end is recorded.

nextLevelGap: No comprehensive binding and implementable regime covers jurisdiction, registration, safety, resources, rights, liability, and disputes for persistent settlement.
statusRationale: Binding national resource-law evidence remains active and no capability-wide institutional end is recorded.

nextLevelGap: Repeatable capital formation and operating finance have not supported settlement infrastructure across more than one political or venture cycle.
statusRationale: VIPER was one project cancellation and explicitly does not end the broader funding capability or NASA lunar program.

nextLevelGap: No routinely used settlement stack combines actuarial risk transfer, certification, interoperable standards, payment, and escrow across organizations.
statusRationale: Published interoperability standards remain active and no capability-wide institutional end is recorded.

nextLevelGap: The reviewed official corpus contains no direct evidence of one persistent off-Earth activity operating launch markets, finance, governance, standards, and risk transfer as a single settlement economy.
statusRationale: L0 records absence of direct integration evidence, not absence of component institutions; no capability-wide program end is recorded.
